news_data.title: Evergrande Defaults on $300B in Liabilities
news_data.snippet: China's largest property developer missed coupon payments on offshore bonds, triggering formal default.

news_data.title: Evergrande Debt Crisis Shakes Global Markets
news_data.snippet: Fears of systemic contagion spread as Evergrande's $300B debt pile raised concerns across China's property sector.

news_data.title: Evergrande Restructuring Plan Rejected by Creditors
news_data.snippet: Offshore bondholders rejected the proposed debt restructuring, calling recovery terms insufficient.

news_data.title: Hong Kong Court Orders Evergrande Liquidation
news_data.snippet: A Hong Kong judge ordered the wind-up of China Evergrande after failed negotiations with creditors.

news_data.title: Evergrande Chairman Hui Ka Yan Detained
news_data.snippet: Founder placed under police surveillance amid investigations into fund transfers and asset concealment.

social_data.title: Evergrande Homebuyers Protest Unfinished Units
social_data.snippet: Thousands of families paid for apartments that were never completed. Protests erupting across multiple cities.

social_data.title: Evergrande Bondholder Discussion
social_data.snippet: Recovery rate will be under 5 cents on the dollar. This is a total wipeout for offshore investors.

social_data.title: China Property Sector Meltdown
social_data.snippet: Evergrande was just the first domino. Country Garden, Sunac, and Kaisa all followed into distress.

review_data.title: Evergrande Employee Review — Sales Manager
review_data.snippet: Company stopped paying salaries months ago. Projects halted. Everyone looking for new jobs.

review_data.title: Evergrande Employee Review — Engineer
review_data.snippet: Construction sites abandoned. Suppliers unpaid. The scale of the collapse is hard to comprehend.
